components.name: TodoAddFormComponent

inputsClass.name: addTodoForm
inputsClass.description: Reactive form group that contains the title control.
inputsClass.rawdescription: Reactive form group that contains the `title` control.

inputsClass.name: titleControl
inputsClass.description: Title form control used for hint and validation state in the template.
inputsClass.rawdescription: Title form control used for hint and validation state in the template.

outputsClass.name: addRequested
outputsClass.description: Emits when the user submits the form.
outputsClass.rawdescription: Emits when the user submits the form.

propertiesClass.name: testIds
propertiesClass.description: Stable data-testid values used by the template and test suites.
propertiesClass.rawdescription: Stable `data-testid` values used by the template and test suites.

methodsClass.name: requestAdd
methodsClass.rawdescription: Emits submit intent to the container component.
methodsClass.description: Emits submit intent to the container component.

components.templateData:
<form
  [attr.data-testid]="testIds.root"
  class="composer"
  [formGroup]="addTodoForm()"
  (ngSubmit)="requestAdd()"
  novalidate
>
  <mat-form-field appearance="outline" class="title-field">
    <mat-label>Add an item</mat-label>
    <input
      matInput
      formControlName="title"
      maxlength="120"
      placeholder="Outline launch notes"
      [attr.data-testid]="testIds.titleInput"
    />
    <mat-hint align="end">{{ titleControl().value.length }}/120</mat-hint>

    @if (titleControl().touched && titleControl().hasError('trimmedRequired')) {
      <mat-error [attr.data-testid]="testIds.errorRequired"
        >Enter a task before adding it.</mat-error
      >
    }

    @if (titleControl().touched && titleControl().hasError('maxlength')) {
      <mat-error>Keep each task under 120 characters.</mat-error>
    }
  </mat-form-field>

  <button
    mat-flat-button
    type="submit"
    class="add-button"
    [attr.data-testid]="testIds.submitButton"
  >
    <mat-icon>add_task</mat-icon>
    Add item
  </button>
</form>

functions.name: generateTestIds
functions.description:
Creates a scoped test-id builder for generating stable data-testid values.

Generated values follow this convention:

  • scopeTestId: scope-name
  • ${elementName}TestId: scope-name--element-name

Scope and element names are normalized to kebab-case, so camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, and spaced words produce consistent IDs.

jsdoctags.comment: Builder with an add(...elementNames) method for generating IDs.

const { scopeTestId, titleInputTestId, submitButtonTestId } = generateTestIds({ scopeName: 'addForm' }).add( 'titleInput', 'submitButton', );

// scopeTestId -> "add-form" // titleInputTestId -> "add-form--title-input" // submitButtonTestId -> "add-form--submit-button"
